name: sample_plan_recomp
description: 28yo female beginner, 28% BF, recomp goal, home gym 3 days/week

notes: BF% was user-provided; consider verifying with Navy/calloipers.
Frame-size adjustment (wrist circumference): ±10% for small/large frame.
FFMI=18.0 — significant headroom to natural ceiling (19.1 kg FFM remaining at FFMI=25).
Berkhan stage-shredded max for height=165cm: 65.0 kg at 5-6% BF.
Expected monthly muscle gain (beginner, female): ~0.50 kg/month with proper training + nutrition.

assessment.summary: Female, 28y, 165cm, 68.0kg • BMI 25.0 (normal) • BF% 28.0 (acceptable, via user_provided) • LBM 49.0kg, fat mass 19.0kg • FFMI 18.0 (norm: 18.9, natural ceiling 25.0, 72% of ceiling) • Recommended: RECOMP — BF%=28.0 — good recomp potential (0-10% deficit).

notes: Saturated fat ceiling: <25 g (10% of calories).
~20% of daily fluid intake typically comes from food.
Fiber target: 31 g (14 g per 1,000 kcal)
At-risk nutrients for dieters: calcium, zinc, magnesium, iron, vitamin D.
Maintain dairy + red meat + sun exposure to avoid deficiencies.
Vegan/vegetarian Phase-2: add B12, iron, zinc, calcium, omega-3, D3, creatine.

workouts.notes: Deload week: -1 set per exercise, same load.

workouts.notes: Deload week: -1 set per exercise, same load.

workouts.name: Workout C (Deload)
workouts.notes: Deload week: -1 set per exercise, same load.

notes: Volume target: 10-20 hard sets per muscle group per week (recomp/general).
Compound movements as foundation; progressive overload primary driver.
⚠ chest volume = 4 sets/wk (below 10-set minimum). Consider adding accessory work.
Phase-1 framework: ships with default templates. User-supplied exercise resources will extend the library in Phase-2.
Daily target: 2238 kcal, P108g / C340g / F50g
7-day rotating template — food choices vary daily for variety.
Vegetables are 'free' (low calorie, high volume) — add liberally.
Phase-1 framework: simple greedy allocator. Phase-2 will use optimization-based selection once detailed food database is loaded.
Swap proteins: chicken ↔ turkey ↔ fish; carbs: rice ↔ potato ↔ pasta.

plan.summary:
=== Fitness Plan Summary ===
User: female, 28y, 165cm, 68.0kg
Assessment: BF=28.0% (acceptable), BMI=25.0, FFMI=18.0
Strategy: RECOMP
  — BF%=28.0 — good recomp potential (0-10% deficit).
Nutrition:
  • TDEE: 2355 kcal
  • Target: 2238 kcal (-118 vs TDEE)
  • Macros: P108g / C340g / F50g
  • Hydration: 2.5 L/day
  • Fiber: 31 g/day
  • Timeline: ~12 weeks to goal
Training:
  • Split: full_body (3d/wk)
  • Progression: linear
  • Mesocycle: 4w + deload
  • Workouts per cycle: 3
Meal plan:
  • Frequency: 3 meals/day
  • Template: 7-day rotation
  • Daily target: 2238 kcal
